summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Product Launch Score feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Launch score computation, products API, daily-winners API, and reasoning generation all working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/automation/compute-launch-scores returns 401 with invalid API key
POST /api/automation/compute-launch-scores with valid API key updates all products
GET /api/products returns launch_score, launch_score_label, launch_score_reasoning fields
Products have valid launch_score_label values (strong_launch, promising, risky, avoid)
Products with launch_score >= 80 have strong_launch label
Daily winners sorted by launch_score descending
Daily winners have all required fields including launch_score_reasoning
Launch score reasoning includes strengths for strong/promising products
Risky products have weaknesses/caution in reasoning
GET /api/automation/pipeline/status includes with_launch_score and strong_launch stats
Electric Heated Lunch Box has launch_score=84 with strong_launch label
critical_code_review_comments: Launch score reasoning properly identifies top 2 strengths and weaknesses based on component scores
Daily-winners endpoint correctly sorts by launch_score and includes all new fields
Pipeline status correctly tracks products with launch_score and strong_launch count
seed_data_creation: None - tested existing products with computed launch scores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Launch Score feature fully implemented. Key endpoints: POST /api/automation/compute-launch-scores (requires X-API-Key), GET /api/products (returns launch_score fields), GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners (sorted by launch_score). Formula verified: 0.30*trend + 0.25*margin + 0.20*competition + 0.15*ad_activity + 0.10*supplier_demand. Categories: 80+=strong_launch, 60-79=promising, 40-59=risky, <40=avoid.

example_product.name: Electric Heated Lunch Box
example_product.label: strong_launch
example_product.reasoning: Strong: Advertiser validation, Market accessibility. Excellent conditions for launch

features_verified.compute_launch_scores_api: Working - updates all products with launch scores
features_verified.daily_winners_launch_score: Working - sorted by launch_score, includes all new fields
features_verified.pipeline_status_stats: Working - tracks with_launch_score and strong_launch counts
features_verified.reasoning_generation: Working - includes strengths for good scores, weaknesses for risky scores
